application_application_message.description: The message to show users when they are prompted to apply in the notification_channels

application_application_role_id.description: The role to give applicants when their application is approved

application_manage_role_ids.description: The roles required to manage the applications (not required to apply)

application_management_channel.description: The channel the application notifications and reminders should appear in

application_max_age.description: After this many days, the system will auto reject the applications

application_notification_channels.description: The channels that should receive periodic messages about the application, with a button to apply

application_notification_cron_config.description: CronTab for users being notified about the application

application_ping_role.description: The role to ping when a new application is created

application_reminder_cron_config.description: Crontab for executing pending reminder events

automod_alert_channel.description: The channel to send auto-protect alerts to

automod_banned_file_extensions.description: A list of all file extensions to be blocked and have a auto warning issued

automod_banned_file_hashes.description: A list of all file hashes to be blocked and have a auto warning issued

automod_bypass_roles.description: The list of role names associated with bypassed roles by the auto-protect

automod_channels.description: The list of channels to enable automod in

automod_max_mentions.description: Max number of mentions allowed in a message before triggering auto-protect

automod_string_map.description: Mapping of keyword strings to data defining the action taken by auto-protect

core_command_prefix.description: The prefix to use for legacy commands

core_enable_logging.description: Whether the botlogging module should be enabled. When disabled, core logs will all be turned off

core_enabled_extensions.description: A list of all extensions enabled in the guild

core_guild_events_channel.description: The channel to log guild events to. This includes message events

core_guild_id.description: This is used as a validation tool, the guild ID that this config belongs to

core_logging_channel.description: This is the bot events logging channel

core_member_events_channel.description: The channel to log member events to.

core_nickname_filter.description: Whether to run the nickname filter or not

core_private_channels.description: A list of channels to exclude from logging events

duck_allow_manipulation.description: Controls whether release, donate, or kill commands are enabled

duck_cooldown.description: The amount of time in seconds to wait between bef/bang messages

duck_hunt_channels.description: The list of channels the duck should appear in

duck_max_wait.description: The maximum number of hours to wait between duck events

duck_min_wait.description: The minimum number of hours to wait between duck events

duck_mute_for_cooldown.description: If enabled, users who miss will be timed out for the cooldown seconds

duck_spawn_user.description: A list of users allowed to use thje .duck spawn command

duck_success_rate.description: The success rate of bef/bang messages

duck_timeout.description: The amount of time in seconds before the duck disappears

duck_use_category.description: Whether to use the whole category for ducks

dumpdbg_roles.description: Roles permitted to use the dump debug command

embed_embed_roles.description: Roles permitted to use the embed command

factoids_admin_roles.description: The roles required to administrate factoids

factoids_disable_embeds.description: This will force all factoids to not use embeds.

factoids_manage_roles.description: The roles required to manage factoids

factoids_restricted_list.description: List of channel IDs that restricted factoids are allowed to be used in

forum_abandoned_message.description: The message displayed on abandoned threads

forum_body_regex_list.description: List of regex to ban in bodies

forum_close_message.description: The message displayed on closed threads

forum_delete_message.description: The message displayed on deleted threads

forum_duplicate_message.description: The message displayed on duplicated threads

forum_forum_channel_id.description: The forum channel to manage threads in

forum_left_message.description: The message displayed on left threads

forum_max_age_minutes.description: The max age of a thread before it times out

forum_reject_message.description: The message displayed on rejected threads

forum_solve_message.description: The message displayed on solved threads

forum_staff_role_ids.description: Staff roles able to mark threads solved/abandoned/rejected

forum_title_regex_list.description: List of regex to ban in titles

forum_welcome_message.description: The message displayed on new threads

gate_channel.description: The channel the gate is in

gate_delete_wait.description: The amount of time to wait (in seconds) before deleting the welcome message

gate_intro_message.description: The message that's sent when running the intro message command

gate_roles.description: The list of roles to add after user is verified

gate_verify_text.description: The case-insensitive text the user should type to verify themselves

gate_welcome_message.description: The message to send to the user after they are verified

grab_allowed_channels.description: The list of channels to enable the grabs plugin

grab_per_page.description: The number of grabs per page when retrieving all grabs

hangman_hangman_roles.description: The list of role names able to control hangman games

honeypot_channels.description: The list of channels that are honeypots

joke_apply_in_nsfw_channels.description: Toggles whether or not filters are applies in NSFW channels

kanye_channel.description: The ID of the channel the Kanye West quote should appear in

kanye_max_wait.description: The maximum number of hours to wait between Kanye events

kanye_min_wait.description: The minimum number of hours to wait between Kanye events

logger_channel_map.description: Input Channel to Logging Channel mapping

moderation_alert_channel.description: The channel to send moderation and honeypot alerts to

moderation_max_warnings.description: The maximum number of warnings before /warn prompts to ban, and automod autobans

moderator_ban_delete_duration.description: The default amount of days to delete messages for a user after they are banned

moderator_immune_roles.description: The list of role names that are immune to protect commands

modlog_alert_channel.description: The ID of the channel to send auto-protect alerts to

modmail_aliases.description: Custom modmail commands to send message slices

modmail_automatic_rejections.description: If someone sends a message matching regex, blocks thread creation

modmail_automatic_responses.description: If someone sends a message containing a key, sends its value

modmail_modmail_roles.description: Roles that can access modmail and its commands

modmail_roles_to_ping.description: Roles to ping on thread creation

modmail_thread_creation_message.description: The message sent to the user when confirming a thread creation.

news_category.description: The category to use when receiving cronjob headlines

news_channel.description: The ID of the channel the news should appear in

news_country.description: Country code to receive news for (example: US)

news_cron_config.description: Crontab syntax for executing news events

notes_note_bypass.description: A list of roles that shouldn't have notes set or the note role assigned

notes_note_readers.description: Users with roles in this list will be able to use whois

notes_note_role.description: The name of the role to be added when a note is added to a user

notes_note_writers.description: Users with roles in this list will be able to create or delete notes

paste_bypass_roles.description: The list of role names that will bypass the paste system

paste_channels.description: The list of channel ID's that will have the paste service enabled

paste_length_limit.description: The max char limit on messages before they trigger a paste

paste_paste_footer_message.description: The message used on the footer of the large message paste embed

purge_max_purge_amount.description: The max amount of messages allowed to be purged in one command

rate_limit_commands.description: The maximum number of commands run before rate limit triggers

rate_limit_enabled.description: Whether the rate limit feature is enabled or not

rate_limit_time.description: The rolling time window to track for a rate limit

report_alert_channel.description: The ID of the channel to send reports to

report_ping_role.description: The ID of the role to ping when a new report is created

role_all_assignable_roles.description: The list of roles by name that moderators can assign to people

role_allow_all_assign.description: The list of roles that are allowed to assign others roles

role_allow_self_assign.description: The list of roles that are allowed to assign themselves roles

role_self_assign_map.description: A map in the format target: [use, use]

urban_max_responses.description: The max amount of responses per embed page

voting_active_role_id.description: User must have this role to start or participate in votes

voting_reminders_at.description: The list of hours remaining in vote to remind non voters

voting_votes_channel_roles.description: Map of forum channel IDs to a list of role IDs. User must have at least one role from the list.

voting_voting_thresholds.description: 1, % of eligible voters who must vote yes, 2, % of yes/no voters who must have voted yes, 3, % of eligible voters who must have voted anything at all

xp_categories_counted.description: List of category IDs to count for XP

xp_excluded_channels.description: List of channel IDs to exclude for XP

xp_level_roles.description: Dict of levels in XP:Role ID
